component.name: PosterItem
component.script:
sub init() m.poster = m.top.findNode("poster") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.year = m.top.findNode("year") m.badge = m.top.findNode("badge") m.rating = m.top.findNode("rating") m.frame = m.top.findNode("frame") end sub
sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.poster.uri = c.HDPosterUrl m.title.text = c.title m.year.text = c.shortDescriptionLine2 if c.shortDescriptionLine1 <> invalid and c.shortDescriptionLine1 <> "" then m.rating.text = "* " + c.shortDescriptionLine1 m.rating.visible = true else m.rating.visible = false end if if c.releaseDate <> invalid and c.releaseDate <> "" then m.badge.text = c.releaseDate m.badge.visible = true else m.badge.visible = false end if end sub
sub onFocus() f = m.top.focusPercent if f >= 0.5 then m.frame.color = "0xff2424ff" m.title.color = "0xffffffff" else m.frame.color = "0x00000000" m.title.color = "0xc8c8c8ff" end if end sub
